goal: Replace apps/agencyos-web/app/page.tsx with a modern Dark Mode AgencyOS RaaS landing page. Title: 'AgencyOS: Results-as-a-Service'. CTA: 'Start RaaS Engine'. Use Tailwind v4 classes for glassmorphism.
